attributes.action: Unfreeze loan repayment thresholds planned for 2027. It’s a “stealth tax rise”.
attributes.additional_details: Reverse their decision to freeze loan repayment thresholds planned for 2027.
attributes.background: Unfreeze the thresholds - this is a retrospective step which was not known when the loans were taken out. It will force graduates to pay more income back than originally promised, which is a “breach of natural justice”. No other loan arrangements changes the rules after the contract has been agreed.

rejection.details:
We already have a petition open on this subject which you may wish to sign here:

https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/759293
